files.patch:
@@ -181,3 +181,0 @@
-# $(call recurseFiles,dir) -> header.hpp file1.cpp file2.cpp
-recurseFiles = $(strip $(foreach f,$(wildcard $1/*),$(call recurseFiles,$f) $f))
-
@@ -185,1 +182,1 @@
-filterFiles = $(filter $2,$(notdir $(call recurseFiles,$1)))
+filterFiles = $(filter $2,$(notdir $(call FindFiles,$1)))
